title: Uplifting Progressive House
summary: Festival-mainstage 124 BPM progressive house  -  euphoric synth lead and triumphant drop.
prompt: An uplifting progressive house instrumental at 124 BPM. Punchy four-on-the-floor kick, snappy clap on 2 and 4, bright plucked synth melody arpeggiating in a major key, warm bassline locked to the kick, soaring lead synth at the drop, sparkling high hats, big white-noise build-up before each chorus. Festival mainstage energy, euphoric and triumphant.
